summary: Fresh /verify smoke passed: graph context clean, tracked command inventory matches README, init hydration is idempotent in scratch, ignore rules match expectations, bead lint has zero issues, and dependency cycles are empty.

passedChecks.expected: Bead exists and is claimed or in_progress before verification.
passedChecks.result: Returned bead br-omp-backbone-skill-0nc with status in_progress and assignee assistant.

passedChecks.expected: Plan artifact exists and contains a Full Verification section.
passedChecks.result: Read plan.md successfully; Full Verification lists br lint, bv suggest, br dep cycles, git check-ignore, README command inventory, AGENTS headings, init hydration token checks, placeholder scan, and br sync.

passedChecks.command: bv --robot-triage --format json && bv --robot-alerts --format json && br show "br-omp-backbone-skill-0nc" --json
passedChecks.expected: Graph context is current; bead remains relevant; alerts do not block verification.
passedChecks.result: triage data_hash 8aa6ade1f2e30db3; br-omp-backbone-skill-0nc is in_progress; alerts summary total=0 critical=0 warning=0 info=0.

passedChecks.command: git diff --name-only HEAD~1 && git ls-files '.omp/commands/*.md' && git status --short .omp/commands
passedChecks.expected: Per-tick smoke identifies actual changed files and uses tracked command files as the command inventory source of truth; untracked command files are reported separately.
passedChecks.result: Changed files since HEAD~1 are .beads/artifacts/br-omp-backbone-skill-0nc/completion-evidence.json and .beads/issues.jsonl; tracked commands are brainstorm, close, create, init, npm-release, plan, pr, review, ship, verify; git status --short .omp/commands printed no untracked or modified command files.

passedChecks.expected: No blocking lint errors for the bead.
passedChecks.result: Returned {"total":0,"issues":0,"results":[]}.

passedChecks.expected: JSON hygiene check completes; no cycle-breaking requirement blocks this bead.
passedChecks.result: Returned JSON suggestions only: label suggestions for omp and prompt-disconnect, stats total=2, high_confidence_count=2; no dependency or cycle-breaking action required for verification.

passedChecks.expected: No dependency cycles.
passedChecks.result: Returned {"cycles":[],"count":0,"active_count":0,"archived_closed_count":0,"total_count":0}.

passedChecks.expected: Runtime bead files and Python bytecode are ignored; command exits 0 and prints paths.
passedChecks.result: Exit 0; printed .beads/beads.db, .beads/beads.db-wal, .beads/.write.lock, .beads/last-touched, __pycache__/x.pyc, and foo.pyc.

passedChecks.expected: .beads/issues.jsonl is not ignored; command exits 1.
passedChecks.result: Exit 1 observed and reported as expected: git check-ignore .beads/issues.jsonl exit 1.

passedChecks.expected: Tracked shipped command inventory includes exactly the commands README should document.
passedChecks.result: Tracked files: .omp/commands/brainstorm.md, close.md, create.md, init.md, npm-release.md, plan.md, pr.md, review.md, ship.md, verify.md.

passedChecks.expected: No untracked command file is required for README inventory verification.
passedChecks.result: No output; .omp/commands has no modified or untracked files.

passedChecks.command: python3 tracked-command README coverage check using git ls-files '.omp/commands/*.md'
passedChecks.expected: README mentions every tracked shipped command, including npm-release, with missing [].
passedChecks.result: Printed ['brainstorm', 'close', 'create', 'init', 'npm-release', 'plan', 'pr', 'review', 'ship', 'verify'] and missing [].

passedChecks.expected: AGENTS.md contains Project, Setup, Code, Testing, OMP, and Security headings/content.
passedChecks.result: Printed missing []; root AGENTS.md is not just the old stub.

passedChecks.expected: Init command contains AGENTS.md handling and required metadata/verification variables plus replace_exact.
passedChecks.result: Printed missing []; AGENTS.md, project_name, verification_typecheck, verification_lint, verification_test, and replace_exact are present.

passedChecks.command: python3 bad placeholder scan over AGENTS.md, .omp/commands/init.md, README.md, .gitignore
passedChecks.expected: No unresolved OPEN_BRACE placeholders or PROJECT_NAME_MARKER tokens remain in changed files.
passedChecks.result: Printed AGENTS.md [], .omp/commands/init.md [], README.md [], .gitignore [].

passedChecks.command: python3 scratch Phase 2.5 hydration smoke extracted from .omp/commands/init.md, run twice
passedChecks.expected: Missing AGENTS.md is created; second run leaves AGENTS.md byte-identical; exact stub is hydrated without leaving See @.omp/AGENTS.md as the only instruction.
passedChecks.result: Missing-create path produced AGENTS.md, second-run byte-identical True with sha256 eb433e3b74723ab03d37d924bc3257fd7cefd8446c58aeca315e175167790e6e; stub path printed stub hydrated True.

passedChecks.command: search 'Nine slash commands|OPEN_BRACE bead-id CLOSE_BRACE|OPEN_BRACE placeholder CLOSE_BRACE|PROJECT_NAME_MARKER' in AGENTS.md, .omp/commands/init.md, README.md, .gitignore
passedChecks.expected: No stale command-count wording or unresolved template tokens in changed files.
passedChecks.result: No matches found.

passedChecks.expected: .omp/scripts is absent and no extension file was added by this bead.
passedChecks.result: Skipped missing paths: .omp/scripts; existing .omp/extensions/workflow-gate.ts is present and not part of this bead's changed files.

passedChecks.expected: README command inventory/table mentions /npm-release exactly once.
passedChecks.result: One match on README.md line 50: | NPM release | `/npm-release` | Cut an npm release through GitHub Releases and trusted publishing |.

passedChecks.expected: Sync completes after verification evidence flow.
passedChecks.result: Printed Nothing to export (no dirty issues).

artifacts.purpose: Root agents.md-compatible instructions with overview, setup, style, testing, workflow, and security guidance.
Phase 2.5 root AGENTS.md hydration logic verified by scratch idempotence smoke.
Release-facing command inventory verified against tracked command files from git ls-files.
Beads runtime and Python bytecode ignore behavior verified with git check-ignore.
Fresh verification evidence for the daedalus cron per-tick smoke.
